name: Great Panther Mining Limited
description: Great Panther Mining Limited is a gold and silver producer and exploration company with assets in the Americas. The company owns and operates the Tucano Gold Mine in Amapá State, Brazil, and has historically operated silver-gold mines in Mexico, including the Guanajuato Mine Complex and the Topia Mine. Great Panther is focused on growing its production and mineral resources through exploration and development of its existing properties, as well as pursuing acquisition opportunities in the Americas.
